leadText: Poni Gauntlet (Japanese: ポニの険路 Perilous Poni Path) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, connecting to the Poni Coast in the east and the Battle Tree in the west.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Poni Gauntlet is a lush field located by the sea. It has several small waterfalls that stream into the ocean and many wooden bridges across the streams. It is a gathering site for some of the strongest Trainers in Alola.
